title: Mission to Bothawui
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Capture of Kalast]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tatooine]] |image=[[File:MissionvonBothawui.jpg]] |name=Mission to Bothawui |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=c. [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' places the Emperor's mission to Bothawui shortly before the events of {{Film|IV}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to 0 BBY. |place=[[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] |result=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] victory |side1=Galactic Empire |side2=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] *2 [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guards]] *Corrupted Bothans |forces2=[[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Welcome to Bothawui your majesty! To what to we owe this great honor?''"
"''Your disloyalty to the Empire!|A Bothan and the Emperor|}} The '''Mission to Bothawui''' was a skirmish during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Prologue== {{Quote|Moff Kalast was most forthcoming… just before the end. It seems, Tarkin, that the Bothans have chosen a side in this conflict.|Emperor Palpatine|}} After learning that [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan spies]] had supplied the traitorous [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kalast]] with the information about the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] he passed on to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] resolved to punish the Bothans for their treachery himself. ==The skirmish== [[File:Bringyourbothanststheslaughter.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans']] punishment.]] {{Quote|I will take care of this personally...|Emperor Palpatine|}} Upon landing on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] officers greeted the Emperor, and were all slaughtered by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and his [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Royal Guard]] unit proceeded into the city, where Palpatine brainwashed a number of Bothans with [[Mind trick/Legends|Force corrupt]], and proceeded to destroy Bothan assets. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|You have earned the wrath of the Empire. Do not betray us again, or the cost will be even greater next time.|Emperor Palpatine|}} In the end, all the corrupted Bothans were turned on and killed. The Bothans later informed Palpatine that the Death Star plans were going to be beamed to the corvette [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]]. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] gathered his forces and [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|moved]] the fleet to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. ==Behind the scenes== This battle was the eleventh mission of the Imperial campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Skyhook}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Bothawui (0 VSY) |es=Misión a Bothawui |pt=Legends:Missão à Bothawui |uk=Місія на Ботавуї }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bothawui, mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Bothawui]] [[Category:Missions of the Galactic Civil War]]
